creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Michael,

This is not really a bug in the FreeBSD port, but could be a bug with upstream.  I encourage you to file it with them at

    https://codeberg.org/schilytools/schilytools

That said, I am not able to reproduce this issue on my system.  Could you show me a specific command line that causes the problem?

Also, can you please let me know what the specific version of mkisofs is?  Please run (mkisofs -version) to do so.
